title: Bottom Navigation
description: The Bottom Navigation component provides a navigational bar at the bottom of the screen with customizable appearance and behavior. It is highly flexible, supporting different looks, indicator positions, and border options for various interface needs. The item component (AXBottomNavigationItemComponent) extends MXInteractiveComponent and MXLookComponent to provide interactive behavior and visual styling capabilities.

sections.title: Has Border
sections.description: Using the hasBorder property, you can add a line to the top of the bottom navigation.

sections.title: Indicator Position
sections.description: You can determine the display position of the indicator using the indicatorPosition property. Accepts 'top' or 'bottom'. Default is 'top'.

sections.title: Disabled
sections.description: You can disable a bottom navigation item by using the disabled property.

sections.title: Icon Only
sections.description: Bottom navigation items with only icons (no text), verifying spacing and active state.

sections.title: Many Items
sections.description: Five to six items to validate layout responsiveness and indicator width behavior.

props.name: look
props.description: Defines the visual style of the bottom navigation.

props.name: hasBorder
props.description: Adds a border to the top of the bottom navigation.

props.name: indicatorPosition
props.description: Determines the position of the indicator relative to the button ('top' or 'bottom').

events.name: onItemClick
events.description: Emitted when a navigation item is clicked. Payload is the click event.

props.name: name
props.description: The name of the navigation item.

props.name: active
props.description: Indicates if the item is currently active.

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

props.name: look
props.description: Predefined look schemes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

props.name: touched
props.description: Indicates whether the component has been touched. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: disabled
props.description: If set to true, it disables the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

props.name: tabIndex
props.description: Specifies the tabindex of the component. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onClick
events.description: Emitted when the item is clicked. Payload is the click event.

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Fired when an option related to the component changes. Inherited from MXBaseComponent.

events.name: lookChange
events.description: Emitted when the look property changes. Inherited from MXLookComponent.

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Fires each time the component gets focused. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Fires each time the component gets blurred. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emits an event whenever the disabled state of the component changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent.

methods.content:
/**
 * Gets the host HTML element of the component.
 *
 * @returns T - The native DOM element associated with this component.
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Sets a component option with optional lifecycle callbacks.
 *
 * @param option - The option configuration containing the name, value and optional before/after callbacks.
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

/**
 * Registers a touched callback function (ControlValueAccessor method).
 *
 * @param fn - The callback function to register.
 */
registerOnTouched(fn: () => void): void

/**
 * Sets the disabled state of the component.
 *
 * @param isDisabled - Whether the component should be disabled.
 */
setDisabledState(isDisabled: boolean): void

/**
 * Removes focus from the component.
 */
blur(): void

/**
 * Checks if the component is focused or has any focused element.
 *
 * @returns boolean - True if the component has focus.
 */
hasFocus(): boolean
